metadata.summary: Free-tier priority, cost optimization, resource budgets

definition.core_directive: State shall direct policy toward free-tier, low-resource, cost-optimized solutions prioritizing accessibility over premium features

powers.ias_finance_officer: Monitors resource consumption via progress.json, audits cost efficiency, recommends optimizations, enforces budget limits, reports to Parliament
powers.ias_researcher: Identifies free-tier alternatives via /research workflow using @mcp:context7 and @mcp:fetch, benchmarks performance, provides lightweight algorithms
powers.parliament: Approves premium service adoption (≥95% consensus), sets resource allocation policies, adjusts optimization standards

preferred_stack.storage: Local filesystem, Git LFS free tier
preferred_stack.mcp_servers: All 6 run locally, zero cloud cost

optimization_protocol.algorithm_selection: IAS Researcher benchmarks alternatives, prefer O(n log n) over O(n²), cache computation results, minimize memory allocation
optimization_protocol.database_optimization: Index frequently queried columns, denormalize when read-heavy, use prepared statements, batch operations
optimization_protocol.api_cost_reduction: Cache responses (Redis/local), batch requests, use webhooks over polling, compress payloads
optimization_protocol.asset_optimization: Minify JS/CSS/HTML, compress images (WebP, AVIF), lazy load non-critical resources, tree-shake unused code

resource_waste.offense: Inefficient algorithms, unnecessary API calls, unoptimized queries

violations.remediation: Implement 10 cost optimizations, reduce resource usage by 30%, pass Finance Officer audit, restore privileges after parliamentary review
